name: SALT: Salience-Aware Lexical Trie for Long-Context Compression
summary: arXiv:2607.17486v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: As large language models (LLMs) process increasingly longer prompts, computation and KV-cache memory costs have emerged as major bottlenecks in inf...
description: arXiv:2607.17486v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: As large language models (LLMs) process increasingly longer prompts, computation and KV-cache memory costs have emerged as major bottlenecks in inference systems. Existing input-level prompt compression methods address this, but rank each sentence by a scalar relevance score, treating the document as an unstructured pool of words and sentences....
author: Oteo Mamo, Hyunjin Yi, Joydhriti Choudhury, Shangqian Gao, Weikuan Yu
